payload.label: picture
payload.long_description: Square gold-gilded framed botanical image showing a single orange-red flower with green stems and leaves on a cream background; narrow gilded frame appears intact, the image is slightly dim/soft-focused and wall-mounted in the crop, estimated ~2.0 meters from the camera.
